indicator_text: MEP financial-interest declarations should be downloadable in a central, open, machine-readable format on a single hub, rather than scattered as PDFs on 751 separate MEP web pages.
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > MEPs' Financial Interests > Level of Openness
scoring_rule: Three-level rating (good/average/poor); MEP declarations rated POOR
source_quote: Poor … Scattered over 751 different PDFs on MEPs' web pages … PDF format (but at least no longer as scanned documents) … Not downloadable in a central, open, machine-readable format papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:305-321
notes: Table 2 row; "individual chapters' determinations" supplied the rating (footnote 14).

indicator_text: MEP financial-interest declarations should have good scope, up-to-date information, standardised entries (consistent languages and formats), and reliable completeness/accuracy.
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > MEPs' Financial Interests > Data Quality
scoring_rule: Three-level rating (good/average/poor); MEP declarations rated AVERAGE
source_quote: Average … Good scope … Not always up-to-date information … Lack of standardisation of entries (i.e. languages) and format … Unreliable quality of entries (lack of completeness, accuracy) papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:305-321

indicator_text: MEP declaration improvements: increase data quality and degree of detail; publish in open-data format; publish on a centralised data hub; make information searchable and rankable.
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > MEPs' Financial Interests > Areas for Improvement
scoring_rule: Not scored; remediation list
source_quote: Increase data quality and degree of detail … Publish information in open-data format … Publish data on a centralised data hub … Make information searchable and rankable papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:305-321

indicator_text: Transparency Register should sit on one central hub linked to the EU data portal, downloadable in XLS/HTML format, with retrievable up-to-date version.
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > Transparency Register > Level of Openness
scoring_rule: Three-level rating (good/average/poor); Transparency Register rated GOOD
source_quote: Good … One central hub … Linked to the EU data portal … Can be downloaded in XLS / HTML format … Up-to-date data version can be retrieved papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:323-339
notes: Table 2 row; the Register is the only dataset with "good" openness.

indicator_text: Transparency Register should have good scope (wide range of indicators), strong standardisation across languages/free-text categories, and high quality of entries (avoiding incomplete, inaccurate, misleading or incorrect entries).
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > Transparency Register > Data Quality
scoring_rule: Three-level rating (good/average/poor); Transparency Register rated AVERAGE
source_quote: Average … Good scope (wide range of indicators) … Mediocre standardisation (i.e. languages, free text categories) … Poor quality of entries (incomplete, inaccurate, misleading and incorrect entries) papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:323-339

indicator_text: Transparency Register improvements: include systematic checks of entries; improve registration form to include basic plausibility checks; allow for rankings and better data visualisation; better integrate other databases (e.g. lobby meetings, expert group register).
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > Transparency Register > Areas for Improvement
scoring_rule: Not scored; remediation list
source_quote: Increase data quality by including systematic checks of entries … Improve the functionality of the registration form to include basic plausibility checks of entries … Allow for rankings and better data visualisation … Better integrate other databases, such as lobby meetings and the expert group register papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:323-339

indicator_text: Lobby meetings should be downloadable in an open, machine-readable format from a centralised hub, not scattered across 98 different web sites.
section_or_category: DATA QUALITY > Lobby Meetings > Level of Openness
scoring_rule: Three-level rating (good/average/poor); Lobby meetings rated POOR
source_quote: Poor … Scattered over 98 different web sites … Not downloadable in an open, machine-readable format papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:341-353
notes: Table 2 row; supports the FOCAL "98 different websites" claim.

indicator_text: Lobby meetings data should have full scope, timely publication, standardised entries (languages and detail), and high quality of entries.

scoring_rule: Three-level rating (good/average/poor); Lobby meetings rated AVERAGE
source_quote: Average … Limited scope … Mostly timely publication … Lack of standardisation (i.e. languages, detail of entries) … Poor quality of entries at times papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:341-353

indicator_text: Lobby meetings improvements: broaden scope to cover all relevant actors; increase data quality; publish data on a centralised data hub; provide a smart search function; link data to the Transparency Register.

scoring_rule: Not scored; remediation list
source_quote: Broaden scope: cover all relevant actors … Increase data quality … Publish data on a centralised data hub … Provide a smart search function … Link data to the Transparency Register papers/text/TI_2016__open_data_eu_lobbying.txt:341-353
